title: Macros should not be #define'd or #undef'd within a block
description: Macros should not be #define'd or #undef'd within a blockAnalyze your codeintentionality-clearmaintainabilityCode Smellbased-on-misrapitfallWhy is this an issue?More InfoWhile it is legal to place#defineand#undefdirectives anywhere in a source file, placing them outside of the global namespace is misleading since their scope is not actually restricted. This may be inconsistent with developer expectations.Noncompliant code examplenamespace NS { #ifndef MY_HDR #define MY_HDR /* Noncompliant */ #undef FOO /* Noncompliant */ #endif }Compliant solution#ifndef MY_HDR #define MY_HDR #undef FOO #endifAvailable In:Catch issues on the fly,in your IDEDetect issues in your GitHub, Azure DevOps Services, Bitbucket Cloud, GitLab repositoriesAnalyze code in youron-premise CIDeveloper EditionAvailable Sin
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: Macros should not be #define'd or #undef'd within a block.
